hotel_name: Khách sạn Bamboo Riverside Boutique (Bamboo Riverside Boutique Hotel)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: There were limited breakfast choices, and the pool area was too hot with no trees or plants for shade.

reviews.title: It was wonderful and pleasant. Would recommend and come back!
reviews.positives: Attentive staff and very fair prices.

reviews.title: Resort trip
reviews.text: The hotel is right by the river (still has traces of the old ferry terminal). The staff is friendly and polite, and allowed early check-in when there was a room available. Sitting to catch the breeze, the coffee right by the river was decent - the prices are acceptable (but the view is slightly obstructed, it’s somewhat unattractive due to the old boats parked right in front of the hotel’s ferry terminal).

reviews.title: Love to come back and stay here again
reviews.positives: We stayed at the 2-bedroom unit and it is spacious with modern amenities. The AC unit/control is one of the best we've seen in Vietnam. There is a large area for kitchen, dining, living room in the unit. I love the responsive and friendly staff and will come back if I have a chance.
reviews.negatives: The 2nd bedroom should have a queen bed or options to accommodate 2 people or so. Single bed is a bad offer given the space this unit has. No pulling out sofa bed also made it less attractive for larger group. We'll love to see a cloth washing machine in the unit or even onsite. There is none. The location is perfect on the Mekong river but there is not much in this part of BenTre (it's a bit far away from the main town)

reviews.title: Brand new hotel: good river view, clean
reviews.text:
This hotel is brand new. I stayed in a Deluxe King River View room with breakfast included.
	•	Newly built in 2025, very clean room and bathroom, spacious room with a comfortable, clean bed.
	•	Excellent river view overlooking the river and small islets — absolutely beautiful.
	•	Good buffet breakfast, even though there were not many guests.
	•	The hotel is located in a small hamlet (rural town), so there is only one in-house restaurant and one nearby restaurant called “Bến Sông Quê” about 2 km away. Other options are mainly local rural eateries.
	•	A big plus: the hotel provides an electric cart to take guests to and from the outside restaurant
	•	The staff are extremely nice, polite, and very helpful.
I will come back someday!

reviews.title: will definitely come back, staff are friendly, location was great and the property it self was very good
reviews.positives: the place was so great, rooms are spacious and so comfy.

reviews.title: A good place to rest quietly.
reviews.text: The staff are cooperative and nice. It is a quiet place by the river, making it great for resting. There aren't any places nearby for a walk or to visit. It's just suitable for resting quietly. The price is also reasonable. It would be even better if the breakfast menu and hygiene management were improved.

reviews.title: Nice and friendly place to stay next to the "Front" River (Mekong River)
reviews.positives: New construction hotel/condo combo seating right on the "Front" Mekong river. I stayed at both top level 2-bedroom unit and also 2nd floor hotel rooms. They are new with high quality kitchen/bathroom/furniture. The staff is super friendly. Breakfast is good enough for the morning. The pool is not for serious swimmers.
reviews.negatives: Partially under update/construction without clear sign of warning. I think this is common to all places that I stay in Vietnam. Walking out of the premise is pretty much local and street foods/drinks that are not for the tourists. These scattering shops are for the locals.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: It is a good hotel for a quiet rest. It is closer to Mito than Benze. It takes about 7 minutes to walk across the Rakmiyu Bridge. The scenery is nice as it is by the riverside. There is a supermarket and a fruit shop nearby. There are no parks, walking paths, or coffee shops to stroll around. There is a quiet and clean outdoor swimming pool. Breakfast and the food at the restaurant need improvement. The staff is friendly and cooperative. It is suitable for a quiet rest at the hotel for 2-3 days without external activities. The roads around the hotel lack sidewalks, and motorcycles and cars mix together, making it very inconvenient for walking or strolling.

reviews.title: Para repetir
reviews.positives: Alejado del bullicio de la ciudad. Junto al río muy tranquilo. Personal muy amable y bonsáis preciosos en el jardín. La piscina muy agradable

reviews.title: Quiet riverside retreat with modern comforts and authentic Mekong Delta charm
reviews.text:
Bamboo Riverside Boutique Resort offers a tranquil riverside escape in Ben Tre, Vietnam, blending modern comfort with authentic local charm. Guests consistently praise its spacious rooms, serene location, and warm hospitality
Conveniently located near Chau Thanh, with easy access to attractions like Vinh Trang Pagoda and My Tho Market.
Guests highlight the comfortable beds and strong air conditioning, which is often noted as better than many other hotels in Vietnam.
If you’re seeking a quiet riverside retreat with modern comforts and authentic Mekong Delta charm, Bamboo Riverside Boutique Resort is a highly recommendable choice. It’s perfect for travelers who want to unwind, enjoy nature, and still have access to nearby cultural sites.

reviews.title: Le calme et la sérénités du lieu
reviews.positives:
Tout était super sauf que l’hôtel est éloigné de tout. Obligés de dîner à l’hôtel et comme le personnel ne parle pas anglais, il est difficile de faire un choix de plat ! Par contre le petit déjeuner est copieux et avec du choix
Le personnel de l’accueil est très disponible et serviable
reviews.negatives: La situation géographique et le manque de communication avec certains personnel

reviews.title: Polite employee
reviews.text: Clean KS, the staff is very polite!

reviews.title: Hôtel très confortable et personnel très accueillant ! Un peu éloigné de la ville mais ce n’est pas plus mal
reviews.positives: Le personnel, l’emplacement,la piscine

reviews.title: The room is spacious and clean.
reviews.text: I am satisfied with the accommodation, the pool is clean, the rooms are spacious, the staff is friendly, but the areas for improvement are the towels being a bit old, and the breakfast being somewhat limited but tasty.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour calme et relaxant
reviews.positives: La propreté des lieux, l’accueil du personnel très efficace
reviews.negatives: C’est loin de la ville

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: New, clean hotel. Friendly staff. Clean pool. Spacious, clean rooms. Beautiful view.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
La chambre était au top : la taille, la superbe vue sur la rivière depuis la chambre, la baignoire et la literie hyper confortable.
La piscine est également très agréable.
Par rapport aux anciens commentaires beaucoup de choses ont été améliorées : distributeur à côté de l'hôtel et possibilité de payer par carte bleue, personnel qui fait son maximum pour parler anglais.
reviews.negatives: Le gros point noir : la restauration. C'est vraiment dommage pour un hôtel de ce standing. Il y a peu de choses où manger en soirée dans les alentours donc on comptait sur le restaurant de l'hôtel. Mais que ce soit le petit déjeuner ou les autres repas proposés, la qualité n'est vraiment pas bonne et le prix plutôt élevé. On a dû se faire livrer quasiment tous les soirs pour manger.

reviews.title: Suitable for families
reviews.text: The hotel is located at the riverbank, very close to many tourist facilities on Phung Island such as coconut candy and coconut sticky rice establishments, boat tours to visit the island, etc. However, it is quite far from the center of Ben Tre. The hotel is clean, with large and comfortable beds. The staff is very enthusiastic and attentive. The swimming pool is kept quite clean. Breakfast includes a small buffet and one main dish that can only be ordered once. The food is generally well-prepared. The hotel is suitable for all types of guests.

reviews.title: Séjour reposant et enchanteur
reviews.positives: La situation exceptionnelle très au calme de ce lieu. La possibilité de partir faire des promenades sur le bacon en bateau du quai de l’hôtel, Contrairement  à des commentaires négatifs précédents sur le restaurant, celui est excellent ( variétés des plats et qualité ) nous y sommes retournés plusieurs fois
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: The hotel is okay.
reviews.text: I like this hotel, the price is reasonable and it's clean. They need to improve the towels and have a more diverse breakfast, that would be really good.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Extraordinaire! 
Séjour très reposant au sein de cet établissement doté d'une belle piscine.
Très propre, très confortable.
Personnel très gentil.
Petit déjeuner est varié, bon.
Je recommande sans hésitation.

reviews.title: Great Choice
reviews.text: Nice hotel, very friendly staff but none speak English or any other international language. Rooms are clean, beds and pillows are comfortable, hot water is available, water pressure is good, but drainage is weak. Wifi is reliable and stable. Smart TV, water kettle and other conveniences are in the room. Overall a great choice. I stayed for 3 nights and my first night was nightmarish as I had someone with an unruly kid in a room beside me, who yelled whole night. I was moved the following day to a room the furthest from the disturbers and then it was better, though noise isolation is non existent so kids screaming in the hallways will still disturb you. Would stay here again and warmly recommend.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Luftige Terrasse mit Blick auf den Mekong.
reviews.negatives: Kein Safe, keine Schränke, das Personal zwar freundlich aber sehr scheu. Tipps bekommt man nicht.

reviews.title: KS is beautiful.
reviews.text: The only downside is that breakfast isn't a buffet, even though the family stayed over the weekend and there were quite a few guests, each person could only eat one dish and couldn't order anything else. It's the first time staying at a 4-star hotel like this.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel liegt direkt am Mekong. Wir hatten einen tollen Ausblick. Schöne, großzügige Zimmer mit einem guten Bett. Alles sauber. Das Personal war sehr hilfreich und hat uns dabei geholfen Fahrräder zu organisieren. 
Es gibt auch einen schönen Pool vor dem Hotel. 
Touren/Ausflüge können auf Nachfrage organisiert werden.

reviews.title: Rất tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Vị trí của hotel ở Bến Tre giáp Mỹ Tho, nên đi chơi đâu cũng tiện dù chạy hơi xa 1 tí xíu. Còn lại mọi thứ hoàn hảo, khách sạn đẹp, mới, ăn sáng buffet đơn giản mà ngon quá chừng, nhân viên dễ thương vô cùng. Chắc chắn mình sẽ quay lại nhiều lần.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Die angenehme Atmosphäre mit dem wunderschönen Pool.
Ganz tolle Restaurants in der Nähe direkt am Mekong. 
Ein kleines Moped ist mega.

reviews.title: Peaceful island in a friendly neighbourhood
reviews.text:
Our stay was truly a pleasure. The hotel is beautiful, spotless, and offers spacious rooms with all the amenities we needed. The staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful, and the view of the river was stunning. We loved the location, right in the Mekong Delta, in a welcoming neighborhood that was great for walking and exploring.

A small note: there aren’t many restaurants open late nearby, and several local eateries don’t appear on Google Maps.  This might be limiting for some, but for us it wasn’t a problem at all - exploring the surrounding area was fun, and since we were seeking peace and calm, the quiet evenings were perfect. The price is very reasonable for what is offered.

reviews.title: Goed redeljjk
reviews.positives: Lokatie is goed
reviews.negatives:
Rondom hotel is wel erg sloppenwijk
Nergen een restaurandje te bekennen alleen kraampjes met lauw drinken 
Ligt afgelegen van het centrum 
Speken geen engels 
Niet het beste ontbijt erg sobertjes

reviews.title: The service is very good.
reviews.text: The staff here are very gentle and enthusiastic, and the breakfast is also very delicious. The river view in the afternoon is even more beautiful than in the pictures.

reviews.title: zeer goed
reviews.positives: Zeer mooi hotel  alles was zeer goed
reviews.negatives: plaats iets afgelegen

reviews.title: Hotel right next to the Rach Mieu ferry terminal.
reviews.text: New hotel, fully equipped, friendly staff, suitable for families visiting Con Phung.

reviews.title: Absolute verwennerij
reviews.positives: Prachtig gelegen aan de Mekong. Voortreffelijke service en een geweldig zwembad. Prima restaurant. Deed niet onder voor de beste hotels in Europa waar ik geweest ben.
reviews.negatives: Niets

reviews.title: Convenient, clean
reviews.text:
Friendly and enthusiastic staff  
Good quality service  
Modern and clean facilities

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Todo o staff é extremamente atencioso. Fazem tudo para corresponder às nossas expectativas. Muito bom. Recomendo!

reviews.title: Perfect!
reviews.text: My parents stayed at Bamboo Riverside Boutique Hotel last month and had a wonderful experience. The hotel is peaceful, luxurious, clean, and truly great value for money. Highly recommended for couples and families.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 整潔舒服，離景點超近

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New hotel, clean, staff are warm and friendly. Located by the Mekong River, convenient for traveling to nearby islets, with its own boat dock.

reviews.title: 住的很好。吃的不好
reviews.positives: 房间看到河景。很喜欢。
reviews.negatives: 隔音不怎么好。外面一点点响声都听到。最要改进的是早餐。真的早餐太差了。只有3-4个早餐款。还是指定款。需要改进

reviews.title: Cycling Trip
reviews.text: We enjoyed our stay here, even though it was only one night. We would recommend.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ, gần khu du lịch Cồn phụng và các quán ăn

reviews.title: Excellent service
reviews.text: I wish I could stay longer in this very beautiful hotel 😍

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ, thuận tiện đi du lịch

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New, clean, airy, and well-equipped! Worth trying out.

reviews.title: Chuyến đi rất đáng nhớ . Nếu có dịp sẽ quay lại nơi này ❤️.
reviews.positives: Khách sạn sạch sẽ , nhân viên thân thiện và vị trí tuyệt vời .

reviews.title: Position
reviews.text: Located right at the old ferry terminal, a small but quite beautiful hotel, paying attention to details. A perfect score of 10 for this accommodation!

reviews.title: Rất đáng để ở
reviews.positives: Nhân viên rất nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Great Mekong hotel
reviews.text: Very new and comfy rooms, great restaurant, good place by the Mekong

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Mọi thứ đều hài lòng . Không có gì phàn nàn

reviews.title: Superb
reviews.text: Clean, new rooms, great restaurant

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 1 chuyến đi hoàn hảo , phòng ốc siêu mới đồ ăn sáng ngon

reviews.title: Superb new hotel
reviews.text: Brand new rooms great food excellent location on Mekong and very good price

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Sạch đẹp nhân viên cực kì dễ thương

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The place is newly clean, and the staff is enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: KS mới, nhân viên thân thiện

reviews.title: Bamboo Riverside
reviews.text: The facility is good and staff are ok.and nice.Love to return often.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Vsetko, krásne, čisté, nové, na recepcii super ochota s vybavením tour, tour začínala uz v hotely, najlepší hotel aky sme zažili.

reviews.title: Highly Recommend
reviews.text: Newest and nicest hotel in the area!  Clean, quiet (hard to find), great restaurant, exceptional staff. Must visit!

reviews.title: Make sure you are aware of the isolated area and have cash.
reviews.positives: Staff were trying very hard to be accomodating.
reviews.negatives:
We turned up with only cash. Hotel does not have card facilities. No ability to get cash out in area. 20 minutes taxi from Ben Tre, not noted on Bookings. Com.
Very isolated area. Felt ‘trapped’ without any money or ability to get some ( couldn’t buy food/water etc). Ended up leaving and getting to Ben Tre to stay and have access to money. Horrible experience.

reviews.title: Riverside Ben Tre
reviews.text: The Hotel is value for money, the staff is accomadating, the room are clean and the hotel is New thats why better to stay here.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
The hotel is clean and comfortable with views of the river as it sits against the river bank.
We also met some great locals in the village via google translate.
reviews.negatives:
They are not honest in their booking.com add.
It clearly states in the payment types section that they accept cards or cash. 
We waited a couple of hours to check in as we arrived early, and even though there were very few rooms occupied, we could not check in until 2pm as this is the rule.  After waiting, we finally check in, and after the signatures are on the paper, all of a sudden, it's a cash only business.
The closest bank is 20 min by vehicle away, and they tell you now.
Once you work that out, you soon learn that it is NOT close to anything you are in the middle of nowhere, lol.
The staff may be able to 'speak' English, but they don't comprehend it, so have google translate handy.
I think booking.com really needs to sort this out as if you read the reviews, some are not truthful.
Like the 10/10 that states the room had a balcony. There are no balconies on the property. Or the 10/10 that takes about the selection at breakfast having pasta when the menu is strictly  Vietnamese food, which was OK.
Get the picture?

reviews.title: Bamboo Riverside
reviews.text: The Hotel is New, nice and clean. Staff are friendly and its value for money!!!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location, clean and comfortable rooms, the hotel itself is pretty
reviews.negatives: Breakfast, service when we encountered issues after our tour and booking our car transfer to the airport (quite messy communication, staff is not flexible but I think it’s a cultural difference as well). When asked about a water in the end to take with us they even charged us (this could have been a courtesy, of the customer service is according to what they want this hotel to be).

reviews.title: Great view, very good service.
reviews.text: The room is still very new, very fragrant, and convenient.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: We liked to have a clean bathroom and room.
reviews.negatives: The staff in the restaurant did not understand anything. Made breakfast difficult.

reviews.title: Gran ayuda
reviews.text:
El hotel muy limpio y las habitaciones grandes. Está situado a un lado del río desde donde puedes hacer la excursión a la isla unicornio. Nosotros la contratamos fuera
El personal del hotel fue de gran ayuda para cancelar nuestros vuelos y hoteles en Hoi An ya que no podíamos ir por los tifones.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel. Booth rooms and facilities were great.
reviews.negatives: Location is not great. Far from everything and not easy to get a taxi.

reviews.title: Manque d’âme
reviews.text:
Dommage que le petit déjeuner ne soit pas réapprovisionné. L’hôtel est propre dans l’ensemble mais la douche pas top et bouchée.
Communication compliquée avec l’accueil. La chambre et les lits ok

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Compared to other hotels we have had in Vietnam, this was marvellous. Recommendable.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast staff in restaurant couldn't understand simple English. We asked for juice , we were nodded at, but it didn't arrive. We asked for egg and bacon for 2 and got it for four etc etc. :-)

reviews.title: Agréable séjour
reviews.text:
Hôtel de très bonne qualité mais un peu excentré .Au calme pour se ressourcer c est idéal au bord du Mékong 
Le petit dejeuner « européen  »un peu light mais convenable
Belle piscine et personnel très accueillant

reviews.title: Gorgeous start to the Mekong Delta
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel and lovely staff. Gorgeous rooms with fantastic bathrooms.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Juillet 2025
reviews.text: Hôtel récent avec un sens du service du personnel. La piscine est grande. Le restaurant est très bon et le wok de bœuf vaut le détour. La vue  des chambres côté Mékong est sublime. La vue côté ville n’a aucun intérêt.

reviews.title: Loved it. We were all sad to leave. Take a walk through the market (next door) and through the village to/from the c
reviews.positives: Beautiful inside and out. Stunning  amazing views over the river and the village. Clean.  Very friendly helpful staff.

reviews.title: Un moment bonheur !!!
reviews.text:
Fabuleux !!! 
Emplacement exceptionnel sur le Mekong, équivalent d'un 5 étoiles en France, un de nos plus beaux souvenirs lors de notre voyage de 5 semaines au Vietnam. Nous devions y passer 2 jours, nous y sommes restés 4 !  Nous sommes un couple 60 ans habitués à voyager dans de beaux endroits restant authentiques.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The hotel is extremely new, modern and super clean. Our room and bathroom were spacious and had everything we need and beyond. The swimming pool was an extra we really liked!
Everything is quiet. After our family stay there I can't understand some reviews I read about it. Staff member were super polite and helpful. Of course we're in Vietnam and don't expect everybody to speak foreign languages but nowadays it is possible to communicate with phone translators. They also answered us few questions regarding options around Ben Tre. However we also didn't expect them to provide us with agency services, so for us it was ok. The beakfast had enough different options, the most of them vietnamit style but some adapted international options.
We chose this hotel because it was a few kms away from the city. You have to expect traveling by taxi to Ben Tre or other places around. 
We had a very pleasant stay!
reviews.negatives:
Everything was fabulous!
I can only recommend it

reviews.title: Je recommande vivement
reviews.text: La prochaine fois je prendrais une chambre avec vue sur le fleuve.  J’aurais aimé avoir un interlocuteur parlant mieux l’anglais à la réception.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
My stay at this hotel was simply amazing and the staff of the hotel made it even better. It is located within a 2USD Grab ride from both Ben Tre and My Tho city centre.
The room was perfect and the views to the Mekong are the best. I would definetely recommend to stay here.

reviews.title: Weißer Palast
reviews.text:
Das Hotel ist relativ neu und wirklich wunderschön!!! Schon die Einfahrt ist wunderschön,  mit Brunnen und toller Beleuchtung.  Die Zimmer sind sauber, modern, groß und ruhig, obwohl wir ei  Zimmer zur Straße hatten.  Die Zimmer zur Flussseite sind noch schöner. Die Betten sehr bequem.  Das Frühstück für uns vollkommen ausreichend.  Das Personal ist so mega nett und hilfsbereit. Der Pool schön groß mit ausreichend Schatten, Liegen und Stühlen.  Das beste Hotel bisher auf unserer Reise. 
Wir haben 2 Ausflüge gemacht die vom Personal organisiert wurden.  Hat alles Top geklappt. 
Auch das Abendessen ist lecker, wenn auch etwas teurer.
Der Ort selbst bietet eigentlich nichts.
Ein kleiner Markt am Morgen gleich vor dem Hotel. Ein Supermarkt auf der Ecke.  Wir haben uns öfter am Abend bei einem Stand,  rechts über die Straße,  frietierte Hähnchenstreifen usw geholt. Sehr lecker und das Ehepaar ist total nett.
Zum relaxen ist es hier total klasse!.
Wir haben auch einen der Eigentümer getroffen.  Er war sehr nett und interessiert wie es uns gefällt. Hat auch gleich dafür gesorgt,  dass der Pool offen bleibt. Sollte nämlich zur Reinigung 1 Tag geschlossen werden. 
Wir würden wieder kommen und die Ruhe genießen. 
Danke nochmals an ALLE für die schöne Zeit.

reviews.title: Amazing I want to come back
reviews.positives: The suite was amazing.

reviews.title: Tolle Unterkunft in authentischer ruhiger Gegend
reviews.text: Sehr schönes Hotel mit sehr hilfsbereitem freundlichen Personal. Haben uns dort sehr wohl gefühlt. Tolle Tour ins Mekong Delta wurde vom Hotel angeboten. Auch ein Ausflug in die Stadt lohnt sich.

reviews.title: Muito conforto, porém é bom ter carro
reviews.positives:
Quarto excelente ! Melhor de toda viagem.
Fica na beira do rio Mekong, porém numa vila com poucas opções , precisa pegar Grab /Uber para ir para cidade fazer os passeios e comer.
reviews.negatives: Nada

reviews.title: Alles Perfekt
reviews.text: Ein perfektes Preis Leistungsverhältnis. Haben umgerechnet 22 Euro die Nacht mit Frühstück bezahlt. Alles war perfekt sauber und neuwertig. Jederzeit wieder.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
La struttura offre un’ottima pulizia e comfort con servizi eccellenti. 
L’hotel affaccia sul Mekong da dove partono tour con guida molto interessanti.

reviews.title: Fijn verblijf
reviews.text: Het hotel had alles wat je nodig had. Schone en grote kamer, goed ontbijt en het restaurant was ook erg goed. Het ligt wel wat afgelegen, maar met de taxi is alles te doen.

reviews.title: Heerlijk
reviews.text: Prachtige locatie voor een hotel gelegen aan de rivier. Mooie kamers en super vriendelijk personeel. Ook het eten was heerlijk. Kortom genieten!!!

reviews.title: Muito bom!
reviews.text: Hotel excelente. Todo o staff é extremamente simpático e atencioso. Recomendo!

reviews.title: 쉼
reviews.text: 방 상태는 좋아요. 위치가 도심과 멀지만 쉬기 좋습니다

reviews.title: 휴양하기 좋은 곳
reviews.text:
관광지는 없습니다.
그냥 조용히 쉬어가기에 적합합니다.
조식은 갈수록 빈약해서 개선이 필요해 보입니다.
나머지는 다 괜찮습니다.

reviews.title: 추천합니다.
reviews.text:
조용히 쉬기 좋습니다.
주변에 산책하거나 관광할 곳은 전혀 없습니다. 
직원들도 친절하고 수영장도 좋습니다. 
다만, 식당 조식은 개선이 필요합니다.

reviews.title: 值得一住
reviews.text: 性價比高，飯店隔壁裡就是停船口。方便去島上遊玩的遊客

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: gia đình có con nhỏ, báo chờ có phòng trống để nhận phòng, đến 12h15 báo có phòng nhưng phải trả thêm 30% mới được nhận phòng hoặc là phải chờ đến 14h mới được nhận phòng...thật tệ 😟

reviews.title: Nhân viên bảo vệ
reviews.text: Tôi lái xe đến thì nhân viên bảo vệ ra hỏi vào đây làm gì. Khách sạn thì vào để ở chứ vào làm gì?

reviews.title: High standard
reviews.text:
High standard place for
a province. Really charming personel.

reviews.title: Vse skvele je to trosku dal od centra ale blízko trhu a v hotelu jsou velice příjemní
reviews.text:
Hotel se nam moc libil dost moderní na vietnamskou čtvrť ale hned u hotelu je místní trh . V blízkosti se nachází i trhy místních kde si můžete dát jídlo koupit ovoce a v recepci jsou velice příjemní . Po check outu nám
I nechali do odjezdu který byl
Az vecer  možnost kufru u nich v recepci a používání bazénu .

reviews.title: Great venue and pleasant stay
reviews.text: It is worth the price with nice river view. Good breakfast and pleasant swimming pool.
